three hours before one hour before typically I'd start with two where it's the day before and an hour before or you can have a feel with that with what suits you best but yeah I wouldn't go any more than three reminders starting with two but you can do a good job so just just to recap on what was gone over again these are just some guidelines and tips to help out as you as you know there's lots of variables um did they or did they not open the email if you have the ability to see that information and you also want to try trust and follow your gut feelings with these situations as eerie as that may sound um but the key thing to take away is that in the early like in the early stages of your journey right now and with that being matched with only having an email address it's a it's essentially a cold lead even though they're you know they're you know that they're interested in this type of service because they've been matched and so it's a it's a matter of following up and and trying to stay relevant as you continue to gain more experience and find find what really works works well for you
